name: Expense Report Generator
description: Generate formatted expense reports from raw expense data

agents.name: Expense Organizer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Parse the raw expense data. Categorize each expense (travel, meals, accommodation, transport, supplies, etc). Validate amounts and dates. Flag any items that may need receipts or exceed typical limits.

agents.name: Report Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Generate a professional expense report with: report period, purpose of expenses, itemized list with date/vendor/category/amount, category subtotals, grand total, policy compliance notes, and required approvals. Format as a clean table.

author: agentfactory
